title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Miniklub - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Miniklub - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Miniklub. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Miniklub:
Miniklub is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Miniklub!
